name: io.github.correctover/correctover-mcp-server
description: MCP Reliability Layer — real-time 6-dimension AI output validation (structure, schema, latency, cost, identity, integrity) with automatic self-healing failover across 9+ LLM providers. BYOK, zero-dependency.

environmentVariables.name: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: DeepSeek API key for LLM routing

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for LLM routing

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for LLM routing

environmentVariables.name: MOONSHOT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Moonshot/Kimi API key for LLM routing

environmentVariables.name: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Alibaba DashScope API key for Qwen models
